entry.title: Sunsetdecoy
entry.summary: Offsec: SunsetDecoy Overview: SunsetDecoy is room rated as Easy on Offensive Security Playground which exploits sensitive files exposure to gain foothold and also elevates privileges by exploiting vulnerable processes. Scanning and Enumeration I firstly start by scanning for open ports and service nmap -sV -sC -T4 -A -p- 192.168.53.85 then i scan for directories using FFUF ` ffuf -...

entry.title: Photographer
entry.summary: Offsec: Photography Overview: Photographer is a Linux machine on Offensive Security Proving grounds that exploits a file upload vulnerability in Koken CMS 0.22.24 to Remote code execution vulnerability to gain foothold and then elevates privileges to root with a SUID binary. Scanning and Enumeration I start by looking through the site then I proceed to scan for open ports using nmap ...

entry.title: Ohsint
entry.summary: tags: OSINT — Tryhackme: OhSINT Overview: The OhSINT room is one rated as easy on Tryhackme, it uses various OSINT techniques and tools to gain the information needed. So I downloaded the file and viewed it using eog tool then i view the metadata of the image using exiftool and then got the name of the person as OWoodflint checking google for the name found, i see different ...

entry.title: Mr robot
entry.summary: Tryhackme: MrRobot Overview: MrRobot is a LInux machine on Tryhackme rated as Easy, this machine exploits a wordpress theme to gain foothold using a reverse shell and after pivoting to another user using found credentials, it escalated privileges to root by exploit the nmap binary running with SUID permissions. going to the site, I’m displayed with the page below prepare command gave...

entry.title: Funboxeasy
entry.summary: Offsec PG: FunboxEasy Overview: The FunboxEasy machine is a Linux machine rated as easy on Offensive Security playgrounds, it exploits file upload vulnerability to gain foothold using a reverse shell and then elevates privileges to root by exploiting the time binary. Scanning and Enumeration so going to the site I’m presented with the default Apache page then i scan for open ports a...
